title: Angle Alligator
short_description: Read the alligator's jaw angle to feed him flying snacks — get it wrong and his jaw locks open and a dentist bird moves in.
description: Snappy the alligator only eats snacks served at EXACTLY the right jaw angle. Look at his open jaw, then name the angle — is it acute, right or obtuse? How many degrees? Get it wrong and his jaw locks open, a dentist bird moves in, and Snappy has to listen to a lecture about flossing. Grade bands ramp from spotting acute, right and obtuse angles, to estimating degrees, to straight angles and sneaky close-together choices under time pressure. A free online angles and geometry game for kids in grades 3–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the answer that matches the jaw angle, before the timer runs out.
